subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I commune with Thee in the hidden recesses of my soul and the essence of my heart, and with my tongue, in the depths of night, with utmost supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی اناجیک فی خفیات سری و هویه قلبی و بلسانی فی جنح اللیالی متضرعا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort
